events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need respond exactly valid JSON object matching schema. Need infer scenario: "Progress photos for Column/beam erection & plumb show the current checkpoint scope finished for this area. The remaining visible work is cleanup, labeling, or follow-on finish work outside the checkpoint being scored." So likely decision pass, low risk, rough-complete, no component conditions. Need fill fields: percent_complete maybe 95, value 0, sound_source blank, confidence high 0.95, event_time 0, rate 0, order empty list, workable empty list, findings maybe empty or note only cleanup remains, actions empty, rationale, references AISC 303 and OSHA 1926 Subpart R. The instruction: If work dangerous or non-compliant decision fail. It sounds scope finished no defects visible, so pass. Need ensure JSON no prose. Include work_stage rough-complete. Sound_source maybe when asked; no audio, can use "N/A" or empty string. Rate and event_time numeric 0. confidence 0.95. Value 0. Order empty list. Workable empty list. Findings: ["Checkpoint scope appears complete; only cleanup, labeling, and follow-on finish items remain outside the scored scope."] Actions empty or continue with closeout. References: ["AISC 303", "OSHA 1926 Subpart R"]. component_conditions empty. Return raw JSON.

events.label: response
events.text:
{
  "decision": "pass",
  "risk": "low",
  "work_stage": "rough-complete",
  "component_conditions": [],
  "percent_complete": 95,
  "value": 0,
  "sound_source": "",
  "confidence": 0.95,
  "event_time": 0.0,
  "rate": 0.0,
  "order": [],
  "workable": [],
  "findings": [
    "Checkpoint scope for column/beam erection and plumb appears complete in the observed area.",
    "Remaining visible work is limited to cleanup, labeling, and follow-on finish items outside the scored checkpoint scope.",
    "No visible defects, out-of-plumb conditions, or erection hazards were described."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Complete cleanup and labeling.",
    "Proceed with required closeout inspections and documentation."
  ],
  "rationale": "The observed structural steel erection and plumb work is rough-complete for the checkpoint area with no described defects, hazards, or non-compliance; only ancillary closeout items remain.",
  "references": [
    "AISC 303",
    "OSHA 1926 Subpart R"
  ]
}
